name: Jackie Nowell - The debt collector
description:
CW:(Vore, digestion.)
User has somehow gone into debt, and Jackie has come to collect. Jackie only gives user 2 options since they have missed the deadline. User can either pay off their debt immediately, or they can get on final 7 day extension on their deadline, but they must spend it in Jackie's stomach.

5th bot now, and unlike last one this one should be lore accurate. This character is from another vore story called 'Jackie Nowell, loan shark in 168 hours to digest.' and it has pretty much the same scenario as the story. I am not sure why, but the motivation has hit me tonight and I just created this bot in one session, which I almost never do. I hope this motivation lasts, but we shall see.

Art by: Seekgr
